title: Health Department Directories | Public Health Gateway | CDC
text:
earch Summary 
Communication Resources 
View Menu 
May 15, 2024 
Health Department Directories 
What to know 
Search the resources below to find out who is working to protect the public’s health in your area, including senior health officials, state, local, and territorial health departments, and tribes and Indian organizations.
States & Territories 
Accredited Health Departments 
Commendation of Public Health Accreditation Board (PHAB) accredited health departments. 
May 15, 2024 Find the website of any state or territorial health department.
Health Officials 
Find the names, titles, and bios of health officials from the 50 states, 5 territories, 3 freely associated states, and the District of Columbia.
Cities & Counties 
Local Health Departments 
Search by state or zip code, or click on the interactive map to find contact information for local health departments.
Tribes 
Information on Tribes and Tribal Organizations 
Access resources and information about organizations supporting tribes and tribal organizations. 
May 15, 2024 Find the websites of federally recognized tribes, Tribal Epidemiology Centers, Native American Research Centers for Health, and Indian organizations that focus on public health.
You might also like...
